message:
Command `echo "=== $(date) ==="
ps -p 824793 -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime 2>/dev/null && echo "alive" || echo "DONE"
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/gds/" 2>/dev/null && echo "FINAL GDS!" || echo "no GDS"
cat /tmp/drt_log.txt 2>/dev/null | tail -5
grep "Completing\|Start [0-9]*th\|Total wire.*um" /tmp/librelane_final.log 2>/dev/null | tail -5` executed with exit code 0.

echo "=== $(date) ==="
ps -p 824793 -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime 2>/dev/null && echo "alive" || echo "DONE"
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
